iteration_history.description: Baseline (Step 4 validator output on JUDGE-approved iter-3 network with 78 nodes, 97 edges).
Encoding fix: BR_SYN composite over-collapses non-redundant rate-limiting enzymes (DWF4/DET2/CPD). Override single-KO modifier from 0.99 to 0.0 for T043/T045/T046/T090.

Structural fix: re-added Strigolactone -> Plant_Height (+1) as parallel coherent feed-forward edge alongside the iter-3 Perception Gate (SL -> D14 -> MAX2 -| BZR_BES). Resolves sign conflicts for T110/T111/T112/T115.
Encoding fix: T107 etr1-1 re-encoded from 'knockout' to 'gain_of_function' (gm=2.0) to match Chang 1993 dominant-active biology.

fixes_applied.description: Override BR_SYN composite_member single-KO modifier from 0.99 to 0.0 for DWF4 (T043), DET2 (T045), CPD (T046), DET2+BL rescue (T090).
fixes_applied.reason: BR_SYN composite over-collapses non-redundant enzymes; each single KO is a strong dwarf but gm=0.99 produced near-WT predictions.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: DWF4, DET2, and CPD each encode individually rate-limiting BR biosynthesis steps (DWF4 C-22 hydroxylase; DET2 5-alpha reductase; CPD C-23 hydroxylase). Each single mutant is a strong BR-biosynthesis dwarf (Choe 1998; Szekeres 1996; Li 1996). §9.3 composite criterion requires >=70% redundancy; BR_SYN fails this criterion.

fixes_applied.description: Added Strigolactone -> Plant_Height (+1) parallel direct edge.
fixes_applied.reason: Iter-3 JUDGE loop removed this edge to enforce Motif 1 Perception Gate purity, which inverted predictions for max1/max3/max4 KO (T110-T112), d14 KO (T113), and SL exogenous treatment (T115). Restoring as parallel path preserves gate while fixing 4 of 5 sign conflicts.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Curated edge E211 (Strigolactone -> Plant_Height +1) comes from Umehara 2008 Nature and Gomez-Roldan 2008 Nature. The Perception Gate (D14 + MAX2 -| BZR_BES) remains as the mechanistic signaling-mutant-specific layer; the direct edge is the coherent-feed-forward summary of SL -> SMXL678 -> growth outputs that are not individually curated. Motif 1 purity compromise documented.

fixes_applied.description: Re-encoded T107 ETR1 from knockout (gm=0.0) to gain_of_function (gm=2.0) to match etr1-1 dominant-active biology.
fixes_applied.reason: The evidence sentence 'etr1 mutants are ethylene-insensitive' refers to the canonical etr1-1 dominant mutant, not a loss-of-function. Inverse-receptor logic requires gm=2.0 (constitutively active) to predict 'increased' growth.
fixes_applied.biological_justification: Chang et al. 1993 Science 262:539 showed etr1-1 is a missense gain-of-function allele with constitutive CTR1 activation. Loss-of-function single-etr1 is masked by ETR1/ETR2/ERS1/ERS2/EIN4 redundancy (would give 'unchanged'). The network encodes ETR1 with inverse logic (Ethylene -| ETR1) so the dominant active form needs gm=2.0.
